name: LidLift Skills Catalog
description: Demonstration skills showcasing LidLift's tool-dissonance analysis capabilities
author: LidLift

skills.name: gh-repo-clone
skills.description: Analyze whether 'gh repo clone' is the right tool before cloning GitHub repositories. Demonstrates LidLift's tool-prompt fit scoring, mismatch detection, and alternative recommendation capabilities.
skills.compatibility: Requires gh CLI. LidLift MCP server optional for live analysis.
features: Integration examples in TypeScript, JavaScript, Python
use_cases: Prevent misuse of clone when user wants read-only access
Suggest gh repo view for README inspection
Recommend gh api for single-file reads
Detect ambiguous intents and request clarification
